level_02_core_mission: Own the intelligence layer of Redrob's product
Build and improve ranking systems for candidate-JD matching
Build and improve retrieval systems for candidate discovery
Build and improve matching systems that drive recruiter search results
Drive long-term architecture of candidate-JD matching at scale
level_03_responsibilities: Audit current BM25 + rule-based scoring system and identify highest-leverage fixes
Ship a v2 ranking system that demonstrably improves recruiter-engagement metrics
Design and implement embeddings-based hybrid retrieval and LLM re-ranking architecture
Build evaluation infrastructure — offline benchmarks, online A/B testing, recruiter-feedback loops
Own the full intelligence layer (ranking, retrieval, matching)
Drive long-term candidate-JD matching architecture at scale
Mentor next round of hires (team growing from 4 to 12 engineers)
Ship working systems quickly ('ship a working ranker in a week')
Design evaluation frameworks for ranking systems (NDCG, MRR, MAP)
Build recruiter-experience workflows in collaboration with PM
level_04_required_skills: Evaluation Frameworks (NDCG, MRR, MAP, offline-online correlation)
Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, FAISS, etc.)
level_06_disqualifiers: Pure Research / Academic Labs Only (no production deployment)
Only LangChain Experience (< 12 months, no pre-LLM ML)
No Production Code in last 18 months (architecture-only roles)
Only Consulting Career (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini — entire career)
Only Computer Vision / Speech / Robotics (no NLP/IR exposure)
Closed Source Only (5+ years without papers, talks, or open-source)
Title Chasers (switching every 1.5 years for title bumps)
Framework Enthusiasts Only (demo-level, no systems thinking)

level_07_ideal_profile.experience: 6–8 years total, of which 4–5 in applied ML/AI at product companies
level_07_ideal_profile.system_experience: Shipped at least one end-to-end ranking/search/recommendation system at meaningful scale
level_07_ideal_profile.opinions: Strong opinions on retrieval (hybrid vs dense), evaluation (offline vs online), LLM integration (fine-tune vs prompt) — backed by systems actually built
level_07_ideal_profile.location: Located in, or willing to relocate to, Noida or Pune
level_07_ideal_profile.availability: Active on Redrob platform or clear signal of being in the job market

level_09_experience.note: Some people hit senior judgment at 4 years. Will seriously consider candidates outside the band if other signals are strong.

level_10_seniority.note: Founding team role — implies IC leadership without formal management title.

level_12_evaluation.importance: Critical — JD says 'if you've never thought about how to evaluate a ranking system rigorously, this role will be very painful'

level_13_production_signals: Operational experience (embedding drift, index refresh, retrieval regression)
Ship a working ranker in a week

level_14_company_preference.acceptable: Currently at consulting firm BUT with prior product-company experience
level_14_company_preference.rejected: Entire career at consulting/services firms (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc.)
level_14_company_preference.note: Not about skills — about engineering culture and product mindset.

level_15_company_stage.team_growth: Growing from 4 → 12 engineers in next year
level_15_company_stage.pace: Fast-moving — role definition changes every 6 months
level_15_company_stage.culture: Async-first, write-heavy, disagree openly, decide quickly

level_16_soft_skills: Ownership (own the intelligence layer — founding team mentality)
Product Thinking (work with recruiter-experience PM, think about product)
Shipping Mindset ('ship a working ranker in a week', tilt toward shipper)
Systems Thinking (think about systems, not frameworks)

level_17_logistics.relocation: Open to relocation from Tier-1 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Pune)
level_17_logistics.notice_period: Prefer sub-30-day. Can buy out up to 30 days. 30+ still in scope but higher bar.
level_17_logistics.office: Offices in Noida and Pune, mostly used Tue/Thu, no fixed in-office requirement

level_20_recruiter_intent.mission: Own candidate ranking and retrieval systems — the intelligence layer that decides what recruiters and candidates see
must_have: Production retrieval / ranking system experience (not demos)
Ranking evaluation expertise (NDCG, MRR, MAP, A/B)
Embeddings (deployed to real users, handled drift/regression)
LLM integration judgment (re-ranking, fine-tune vs prompt)
deal_breakers: Pure research only — no production deployment ever
LangChain-only experience (< 12 months, no pre-LLM ML)
No production code in last 18 months
Only CV / speech / robotics — no NLP/IR
Closed source only for 5+ years with no external validation
Title chasers — switching every 1.5 years for promotions
level_20_recruiter_intent.preferred_engineer_type: Shipper > Researcher — must be comfortable shipping fast with 'obviously suboptimal' ML to learn from real users, while also having deep technical depth when it matters
level_20_recruiter_intent.company_environment: Series A startup, async-first, write-heavy, disagree openly, fast-moving, founding-team mentality, team scaling from 4 → 12 engineers
